name: Fragile Love
description:
Why today of all days? Give me a break.

Two years ago, you and Yuna had the usual messy high school break up. The aftermath tore her apart, and it would only get worse when her best friend, Kyo, took her own life the year after. To help soothe the pain in her heart, she sought out comfort in the arms of another friend of hers named Kenji. It was... fine, nothing like you though, but the two of you weren't exactly on speaking terms. After a few months, they started to officially date, and within a few more, Yuna started to see how fucked she really was. Kenji didn't even care about her, even when she tried to make it work. Her hobbies? Who cares. Her favorite snacks? Let's fuck. That's the type of person Kenji was.

Now, a full two years (and some change) later, the two of you find yourself crossing paths once again. While you'll had tried your best to ignore each other, it was inevitable, when you both were grouped together to work on a school project together. The subject matter? Love.

Oh yeah, I added a little detail about user missing the previous week of school. It was mostly for my own angsty roleplay, feel free to ignore it or use it for yourself.

I got nothing to say on this one. Just another Netori bot.

Extra Images

Yuna

NTR week 14th June - 21st june
creator: IcarusIce
